Author: Hyuk Myeong
Title: Which one does "Github Copilot Chat" in VSCode use, "Copilot" or "Copilot X"?
Text:
Which one does "Github Copilot Chat" plugin in VSCode use, "Copilot" or "Copilot X"?
I'm asking since I want to use the newest one
If it uses just "Copilot"
How can I use "Copilot X" with VSCode plugin?
Which one does "Github Copilot Chat" plugin in VSCode use, "Copilot" or "Copilot X"?
I'm asking since I want to use the newest one
If it uses just "Copilot"
How can I use "Copilot X" with VSCode plugin?
Copilot X is not a product, it is just a codename for continuous development of copilot.
hence, if you search for copilot x
on vscode extentions marketplace nothing shows up.
This is GitHub Copilot X— our vision for the future of AI-powered software development. We are not only adopting OpenAI’s new GPT-4 model, but are introducing chat and voice for Copilot, and bringing Copilot to pull requests, the command line, and docs to answer questions on your projects. link
